objective: Re-pin the Security offline reference E2E worker to the private current-state repair head that restores the domain repository validation baseline without expanding the E2E worker write-set.
executable_blocker: The original private Security base is no longer acceptable for E2E acceptance because the domain repository full validation suite is red before the E2E worker files are considered.

evidence: domain validation suite green at repaired head
current-state read-model drift repaired before E2E acceptance
no public copy of private domain paths payloads evidence reports or scientific truth

preservation_contract: all original E2E worker write-set constraints remain active
the amendment only changes the private base from the red current-state head to the repaired current-state head
the worker still edits only the two private adapter source files and two private E2E test files
no public Bridge source contract schema ledger dependency workflow or root configuration file is changed by the worker
no private Security program path target evidence report payload dataset secret account material or scientific truth enters the public repository
no live target scan exploit phishing brute force publication deployment UI or authority escalation is introduced
acceptance_commands: private focused adapter and E2E tests with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 and no pytest cache
private full repo suite against exact pinned public Bridge source
exact four-file E2E write-set plus private current-state repair ancestry privacy dependency network live-authority and weakening scans
stop_conditions: private E2E branch is not a descendant of the repaired private base
write-set expansion beyond the original four E2E files is required
current-state repair introduces public payload leakage or live authority
private full suite remains red after the repaired base and E2E worker are combined
rollback: Agent 0 rejects the amended worker handoff or re-pins it to a later repaired private base. The public Bridge repository, private owner checkout, existing domain registries and external systems remain unchanged.
